steps.title: Set up
steps.content: Locate the row for $29^\circ\text{F}$ air temperature and the column for $15$ mph wind speed in the wind chill table.

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: The value at that intersection is $18^\circ\text{F}$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $18$; substituting or interpreting it in the original condition satisfies the requirement, so $18$ is the value to enter.
